PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gia-Hy Chung in propria persona (Petitioner)
Jason Axtell (Petitioner's husband)

The Court made inquiries regarding Ms. Chung's knowledge of Probate procedures. Ms. Chung stated that she knows the bank requires Letters to open an account in the name of her dad's estate, and does not know the procedures to distribute the funds. Ms. Chung also stated that her husband, her brother, and her brother's wife will help her with the process. Mr. Axtell stated that the estate is all in cash, that his wife and her brother are the only beneficiaries and they will split the money. The Petition for Letters of Administration is Taken Under Submission. If Granted, the Court will set a status hearing on close of estate.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
